CLAUSE.NAME: Collection_LetterToDrawee_PaymentInstruction
CLAUSE.value: • Please complete the authorization to pay and return a duly signed copy thereof to our above mentioned address. • In case you refuse to take up the documents, please inform reason in order to enable us to inform presenting party accordingly. • Please complete the attached authorization to pay and return a duly signed copy thereof to our above mentioned address. • In case you refuse to take up the attached original documents, please return complete set of non amended documents and inform reason in order to enable us to inform presenting party accordingly.
